title: nephrolepis × copelandii
intro: Nephrolepis × copelandii, also known as the Boston fern, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae and is a cross between Nephrolepis exaltata and Nephrolepis biserris. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to its high levels of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Nephrolepis × copelandii include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Nephrolepis × copelandii can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
